summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 4 testing of Singra Vox - all backend APIs and frontend integration working correctly. Tested message pinning, channel topic editing, notifications, custom emoji, webhooks, and bot tokens.

design_issues.issue: WebSocket connection shows error in console but functionality works
design_issues.details: Console shows 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established' but real-time features work

design_issues.issue: React warning about duplicate keys in message components
design_issues.details: Console shows 'Encountered two children with the same key' warning

passed_tests: All Phase 4 API endpoints (56/56 tests passed)
Frontend login and main app loading
